identification.title: HarvestNet: Smallholder farming activity detection (Ethiopia - Tigray, Amhara)

consent.consent_scope: Ground labels and imagery for smallholder harvest-pile detection; consent obtained for ground data collection per project protocol; satellite imagery from commercial/provider terms.

permitted_use.use_restrictions: Academic/research use; see AAAI 2024 paper and dataset repository for terms. 7,000 hand-labeled images; 2,000 ground labels; 2020-2023.

provenance.collector_org: HarvestNet project (see AAAI 2024 paper for affiliations)

audit.notes: Governance record filled for DSA 2026 workshop application. Community/smallholder context; remote sensing + ground labels; Ethiopia.
